media.base_medium: 0.6 M Na+ soda buffer (pH 9.8) haloalkaliphilic mineral medium + Pfennig/Lippert (SL-4) trace elements; autotrophic (CO2/bicarbonate fixed via RuBisCO)

sources_chased.what: trace mineral solution cited as ref 38 (Pfennig & Lippert 1966, Arch Mikrobiol 55:245-256)
sources_chased.how: WebFetch mediadive.dsmz.de/rest/solution/20 (Trace element solution SL-4, the DSMZ 'Pfennig' trace element solution)

media.notes: Autotroph: carbon fixed from the carbonate/bicarbonate soda buffer (upregulated RuBisCO), no organic C source. Nitrogen for this (thiocyanate) medium comes from thiocyanate itself, so no NH4Cl is added. Trace solution = DSMZ SL-4 (the 'Pfennig' trace element solution, ref 38); Cu was boosted to 30 µg/L final because Cu is the TcDH cofactor. SL-4 contains NO vitamins, Se, or W, so those are genuinely absent. The auto-generated Calcium (EX_ca2_e) and Fe3+ (EX_fe3_e) entries have no support in the recipe (no Ca salt; only Fe2+ from FeSO4).

media.base_medium: 0.6 M Na+ soda buffer (pH 9.8) haloalkaliphilic mineral medium + Pfennig/Lippert (SL-4) trace elements; autotrophic (CO2/bicarbonate fixed via RuBisCO); thiosulfate electron donor + NH4Cl nitrogen source

sources_chased.what: trace mineral solution cited as ref 38 (Pfennig & Lippert 1966, Arch Mikrobiol 55:245-256)
sources_chased.how: WebFetch mediadive.dsmz.de/rest/solution/20 (Trace element solution SL-4, the DSMZ 'Pfennig' trace element solution)

media.notes: Same soda-buffer base as the thiocyanate medium; here 40 mM thiosulfate is the electron/sulfur donor and 5 mM NH4Cl the N source. Autotrophic (CO2/bicarbonate). Trace solution = DSMZ SL-4 ('Pfennig' trace elements, ref 38), Cu boosted to 30 µg/L. No vitamins, Se, or W present. Auto-generated Calcium (EX_ca2_e) and Fe3+ (EX_fe3_e) entries are unsupported by the recipe (no Ca salt; only Fe2+ from FeSO4).
